main_heading.title: Rooms
main_heading.subtitle: Manage dorm rooms and link them to buildings and floors

table_heading.title: Manage Rooms
table_heading.subtitle: Use the table and filters to view, edit, and manage rooms within buildings and floors

add_room.title: Add New Room
add_room.description: Create a new room, set its type, floor, and capacity, and link it to the appropriate building.

rooms_count.title: Total Rooms
rooms_count.subtitle: Overview of all rooms in the building

regular_rooms_count.title: Regular
regular_rooms_count.subtitle: Total number of regular rooms across all buildings

premium_rooms_count.label: Premium
premium_rooms_count.subtext: Total number of premium rooms across all buildings

studying_rooms_count.label: Studying
studying_rooms_count.subtext: Total number of studying rooms across all buildings

medical_rooms_count.label: Medical
medical_rooms_count.subtext: Total number of medical rooms across all buildings

delete.title: Confirm Deletion
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete this room? This action cannot be undone.

add.title: Add New Room
add.description: Create a new room and specify its type, floor, capacity, and building.

view.title: View Room Details
view.description: Here you can view all room details, including building, floor, and capacity.

edit.title: Edit Room
edit.description: Update the room details such as name, type, capacity, and availability status.
